description: Adversary crafts malicious input directly into an LLM prompt to override instructions or extract sensitive data
Adversary embeds malicious instructions in data the LLM will process (web pages, documents, emails)
Adversary uses crafted prompts to bypass LLM safety guardrails and content policies
Adversary extracts sensitive data or model information through repeated inference API queries
Adversary injects malicious samples into training datasets to corrupt model behavior
Adversary weaponizes AI capabilities to generate harmful content at scale or automate attacks

technique_name: Valid Account Abuse on AI Platforms
description: Adversary uses legitimate credentials to access AI platforms and extract models or data
Adversary probes system to identify model architecture, version, or family through response analysis
Adversary identifies ML artifacts (models, datasets, pipelines) stored in accessible locations
